fields.actions.name: cmd.exe
fields.observables.file.name: cmd.exe
fields.normalized.name: W32.CmdObfuscatedBatchScriptExecution.ioc
fields.cloud_ioc.description: The Windows Command Line utility (cmd.exe) can be used to execute batch scripts directly by passing the script as a parameter. In this case, cmd.exe was used to execute a heavily obfuscated batch script. This technique is used by attackers to obfuscate the true intent of code and evade security technologies.
